title: Fast Mode
subtitle: Let AI help you create beautiful images and videos

hub.title: Unified Creation Entry
hub.subtitle: Everything except Tasks and Store is now grouped here for faster creative navigation.

workspace.title: Creation Studio
workspace.description: Continue generating images/videos and tuning parameters on this page.

inspiration.title: Inspiration Feed
inspiration.description: Browse trending public gallery works for ideas.

templates.title: Template Center
templates.description: Start quickly with curated templates and reduce prompt writing effort.

tools.title: Toolbox
tools.description: Use packaged workflows to launch generation tasks quickly.

templates.title: Choose a Creation Template
templates.subtitle: Start from preset templates to make AI creation easier

steps.step2: Describe What You Want to Create

projectContext.title: Project Context
projectContext.subtitle: When a project is selected, its description is included in prompt optimization, and checked project assets are used together with local uploads as references.
projectContext.descriptionEmpty: This project does not have a description yet. You can add one from the project page.
projectContext.emptyDescription: Create a project first, then upload assets or import your own past works so you can reuse them here.
projectContext.unsupportedHint: The current model does not support reference assets, but you can still link the task to a project and use the project description in prompt optimization.
projectContext.assetSectionTitle: Choose project assets for this generation
projectContext.assetSectionHint: These assets will be combined with local uploads for the current run.
projectContext.noAssets: This project does not have any assets yet. Add some from the project page first.
projectContext.noUsableAssets: This project has assets, but the current mode can only use compatible ones.

models.title: Choose AI Model
models.subtitle: Each model has different styles and features, choose the one that suits you best

prompt.label: Creation Description
prompt.placeholder: e.g., A young woman in professional attire, confident smile, office background...
prompt.placeholderVideo: e.g., Ocean waves gently hitting the beach, sunset, slow motion...
prompt.hint: Tip: Detailed descriptions help AI better understand your needs. Type @ to reference uploaded or selected images, videos, or audio.
prompt.optimizedResult: AI Optimized Results (pick one to use)
prompt.optimizeError: Prompt optimization failed, please try again
prompt.mentionUnavailable: Upload or select at least one image, video, or audio asset before using @ references

negativePrompt.label: Advanced: Exclude Unwanted Elements (Optional)
negativePrompt.hint: Describe what you don't want in the artwork

uploadReference.label: Upload Reference Images
uploadReference.dropzoneIdle: Drag files here, or click to upload
uploadReference.fileLimitHint: Up to {max} files, each no larger than {size}MB
uploadReference.hint: Optional: Upload reference images for image-to-image creation
uploadReference.hintWithImages: {count} image(s) selected, will use image-to-image mode
uploadReference.hintVideoReference: Optional: Upload reference image(s) for image-to-video generation
uploadReference.hintVideoReferenceWithImages: {count} reference image(s) selected for video generation
uploadReference.hintDoubaoVideoExclusive: Note: For Doubao, reference images and first/last frames are mutually exclusive
uploadReference.hintDoubaoReferenceImages: Optional: Upload 1-4 reference images (mutually exclusive with first/last frames)
uploadReference.hintDoubaoReferenceAudios20: Optional: Upload 1-3 reference audio clips. Audio cannot be used alone and must be paired with at least one reference image or reference video.
uploadReference.hintDoubaoFrames20: Optional: Upload 1-2 images. The first image becomes the first frame, and the second image becomes the last frame.
uploadReference.hintWanxUpload: Wanx supports mixed image, video, and audio references. Reference images plus reference videos can total up to 5 items, and wan2.7 can also take 1 first-frame image at the same time. If any reference video is included, duration must stay between 2 and 10 seconds; otherwise it can be 2 to 15 seconds.
uploadReference.hintWanxReferenceImages: Optional: Upload reference images. They work together with reference videos for subject and scene control, with a combined visual limit of 5.
uploadReference.hintWanxReferenceVideos: Optional: Upload reference videos. Once a reference video is present, the video duration must stay within 2-10 seconds.
uploadReference.hintWanxReferenceAudios: Optional: Upload reference audio clips to define the voice timbre for the matched subject. Audio count cannot exceed the total number of reference images and reference videos.
uploadReference.hintWanxFirstFrame: Optional: Upload 1 first-frame image. It can be used together with reference images and reference videos and is not mutually exclusive with them.
uploadReference.hintWanxFirstFrameRatio: When a first-frame image is uploaded, Wanx follows that image ratio automatically, so the aspect ratio setting is ignored.
uploadReference.hintFirstFrame: First frame uploaded, video will start from this image
uploadReference.hintFirstAndLastFrame: First and last frames uploaded, video will transition from first to last frame
uploadReference.hintDoubaoVideo: Optional: Upload 1-2 images. 1st image as first frame, 2nd image as last frame (optional)
uploadReference.hintMinimaxVideoExclusive: Note: For Hailuo AI, image-to-video and first/last frames are mutually exclusive
uploadReference.hintMinimaxVideo: Optional: Upload 1-2 images. 1st image as first frame, 2nd image as last frame (optional)

parameters.label: Adjust Parameters (Optional)
parameters.generateAudioHint: Seedance 2.0 will generate matching speech, sound effects, and background music from the visuals and prompt.
parameters.enableWebSearchHint: The model may search the web when needed for fresher content. It can be used together with uploaded images, videos, and audio, but may add latency.

videoAssistant.title: Start faster, even if you don't know how to write prompts
videoAssistant.subtitle: Describe the idea in plain language, choose a few options, and AI will generate 1 more professional video prompt for you.
videoAssistant.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. Create a premium skincare ad video that feels clean, warm, and cinematic
videoAssistant.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. a cream jar / a young woman / a sports car
videoAssistant.scenePlaceholder: e.g. morning bathroom / city nightscape / seaside road
videoAssistant.actionPlaceholder: e.g. slowly turns toward camera / waves hit the rocks softly
videoAssistant.mustKeepPlaceholder: e.g. logo stays clear, subject remains centered, preserve warm golden tones
videoAssistant.generating: AI is generating your professional prompt...
videoAssistant.generateHint: AI will combine your idea, camera, pacing, and audio strategy into 1 professional prompt ready for video models.
videoAssistant.emptyError: Add at least a bit of idea, subject, scene, or action before generating a professional prompt
videoAssistant.generateError: Director Assist failed to generate a prompt. Please try again.
videoAssistant.loginRequired: Please log in before using Director Assist
videoAssistant.mediaHint: Use uploaded references to keep the subject, camera motion, or audio mood aligned.
videoAssistant.projectAssetHint: {count} project asset(s) selected. Keep their subject or style consistent in the final prompt.
videoAssistant.audioGenerateHint: If the model supports it, generate audio that better matches the visual rhythm and mood.

audioDirectives.immersive: Audio should emphasize immersive ambience, detailed sound design, and mood music synced with the visuals.
audioDirectives.narration: Audio should emphasize clear voice delivery, suitable for narration, spoken lines, or ad copy.
audioDirectives.ambience: Audio should focus on environmental ambience and natural atmosphere rather than heavy vocal performance.
audioDirectives.silent: Design the shot like a silent video, with the visual storytelling carrying the full message.

professional.title: Professional Prompt
professional.description: AI-generated version synthesized from your creative brief

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.description: Safer and easier to submit directly

cinematic.title: Cinematic Boost
cinematic.description: Stronger on camera language, lighting, and atmosphere

variantDirectives.balanced: Keep the main subject clear, actions coherent, and spatial relationships understandable. Avoid abrupt distortion and irrelevant elements. The result should feel stable and production-ready.
variantDirectives.cinematic: Emphasize shot scale changes, foreground and background depth, lighting transitions, and emotional progression so the output feels like a polished short film.
variantDirectives.creative: Add a stronger opening hook and more memorable visual moments, while keeping the subject stable, recognizable, and narratively focused.

videoAssistant.refineSubtitle: If the current description is close but not there yet, append one clear refinement direction.
videoAssistant.refineApplied: The refinement direction was added to the current description

refinePatches.ad: Make the result feel more like a premium commercial, highlighting subject texture, clean composition, and brand atmosphere with a polished restrained finish.
refinePatches.cinematic: Push the result further toward a cinematic short, with stronger shot layering, lighting atmosphere, depth, and emotional progression.
refinePatches.natural: Make the subject or character movement feel more natural and coherent, avoiding stiffness, exaggeration, and abrupt transitions.
refinePatches.stable: Use a steadier, more restrained camera style with less unnecessary shake and fewer abrupt cuts so the result feels more professional.
refinePatches.rhythm: Make the pacing snappier and cleaner, with a stronger opening hook, clearer motion beats, and smoother transitions.

cost.label: Credits Required
cost.insufficient: Insufficient credits, please purchase a package first

success.title: Creation Task Submitted!
success.message: Your artwork is being generated, check task list for progress

errors.doubaoModesExclusive: For Seedance 2.0, multimodal references and first/last frame inputs are mutually exclusive
errors.doubaoAudioNeedsMedia: Reference audio cannot be used alone; add at least one reference image or reference video
errors.doubaoReferenceImageLimit: You can upload up to 9 reference images
errors.doubaoReferenceVideoLimit: You can upload up to 3 reference videos
errors.doubaoReferenceAudioLimit: You can upload up to 3 reference audio clips
errors.wanxReferenceRequired: Wanx requires at least 1 reference image or reference video
errors.wanxReferenceVisualLimit: Wanx supports up to 5 reference images and reference videos in total
errors.wanxReferenceAudioLimit: The current Wanx model does not support reference audio, or the audio count exceeds the allowed limit
errors.wanxAudioNeedsVisual: Wanx reference audio cannot exceed the total number of reference images and reference videos, and cannot be used alone
errors.wanxI2vRatioUnsupported: Video continuation / last frame does not support aspect ratio
errors.wanxI2vSingleFirstFrame: Only 1 first frame is supported for this combination
errors.wanxI2vSingleLastFrame: Only 1 last frame is supported for this combination
errors.wanxI2vSingleVideo: Only 1 continuation video is supported for this combination
errors.wanxContinuationVideoRequired: Please upload a continuation video first
errors.wanxSingleAudioOnly: Only 1 audio file is supported for this combination
errors.referenceLimitReached: This model supports up to {max} reference asset(s)
errors.referenceAssetsMutuallyExclusive: You cannot select project reference assets while first/last frame input is enabled
errors.promptTooShort: Prompt must be at least 1 character
errors.promptTooLong: Prompt is too long. Please shorten it and try again

featuredTemplates.loginRequired: Please log in to save presets
featuredTemplates.dragHint: Drag sideways or use the arrows to explore more ideas.
featuredTemplates.loginToViewPresets: Sign in to view your saved presets and apply them quickly here.
featuredTemplates.emptySystemDesc: There are no ideas for this mode right now. Try another category or create from scratch.
featuredTemplates.emptyPresetsDesc: Your saved image and video presets will appear here.
